title: Void Cubes
description: Adds decorative blocks featuring the end portal shader effect
body:
The **Void Cube** mod adds four decorative blocks that feature the end portal shader so that you can build your own void


There are two blocks, each with two variants.
The regular variant's center ingredient is a blaze powder.
The alt variant's center ingredient is an Eye of Ender.

The bordered versions are crafted by surrounding the ingredient with any colour of stained glass.\
![Bordered Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/nGnS7XL.png "Bordered Recipes")\
The borderless versions are crafted by surrounding the ingredient with regular glass.\
![Borderless Recipes](https://i.imgur.com/Por2TSJ.png "Borderless Recipes")

### Credits
Ageuxo - Coding\
oude_henky - Idea and border texture
